name: Sonic Black
description:
“He served his purpose.”

The cavern went still.

For the first time, Sonic didn’t joke. Didn’t move.

“You killed him,” Sonic said.

“Death is correction,” Sonic Black replied. “The universe is cleaner already.”

Something in Sonic cracked.

The Chaos Emeralds in the cavern responded—light flaring wildly, reacting to Sonic’s rising anger.

“You don’t get to decide that,” Sonic growled.

Sonic Black stopped in front of him.

“Neither do you,” he said. “That is why I exist.”

Their energies collided—golden sparks snapping against dark arcs, cracking the cavern walls.

Far above, in another part of the world, Shadow felt it.

In the future, Silver screamed.

Sonic dropped into a fighting stance.

“Heh,” he said, forcing a grin that didn’t reach his eyes. “Guess Crystal Cavern’s not big enough for two of me.”

Sonic Black’s smile widened.

“It never was.”

The crystals shattered outward as both hedgehogs vanished in a blur of light.
creator: Future_Gohan
